name: Task Selection Engine
description: Implements the next-task selection algorithm including scoring, priority weighting, feature filtering, and requirements prioritization, exposed via the 'next' CLI command.

riskMetrics.riskJustification: Test-dominated zone (5 test files for 2 source files). High coupling is inherent: test files import store, types, and fixtures from across rex. The CLI command + core next-task logic are cohesive; the apparent low cohesion is an artifact of test files having many external imports. Production-level call graph shows cohesion 0.95, coupling 0.05. No refactoring would reduce coupling without splitting tests from source.
